summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Geamy Services website. All core functionality working correctly including homepage, contact form, admin authentication, and API endpoints.

ui_bugs.issue: Selected service value not displayed visually in dropdown after selection
No success toast message shown after form submission
Form fields not cleared after successful submission

passed_tests: All 8 backend API endpoints responding correctly
Homepage loads with all sections (Hero, Services, About, Terms, Contact)
Navigation sticky header and scroll-to-section functionality
Terminal widget displays animated ping output with 'Status: ONLINE'
Services grid displays all 8 service cards with correct content
Contact form submission successfully stores data in database
Admin login works with provided credentials (admin@geamyservices.com)
Admin dashboard displays analytics cards and contact submissions
Analytics tracking working (page views, contact submissions)
About section tech stack marquee present

success_percentage.integration: 100% (contact form, admin auth, analytics all working)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix minor UI feedback issues: 1) Contact form service dropdown visual state, 2) Add success toast message after form submission, 3) Clear form fields after successful submission. These are cosmetic improvements - core functionality is working perfectly.
